sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9456" key="a)ntanemi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντανεμία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrary wind,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inde An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:60:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
